description_long: This is an open book with a brown cover and light gray pages, lying flat and spread wide. A red ribbon bookmark runs vertically down the center, adding a touch of color and functionality. The pages are blank, with no visible text or illustrations, and the book appears to be of medium thickness. The cover edges are slightly raised above the pages, giving the book a sturdy appearance. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for reading or note-taking. The book's clean lines and lack of embellishments suggest it is a standard, everyday item.
description: An open book with a brown cover, blank light gray pages, and a red ribbon bookmark running down the center.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with both blank pages and the red ribbon bookmark clearly visible in the center.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the book and the red ribbon bookmark running along the page fold.
description_view_2: Bottom edge view showing the book's spine, the spread of the pages, and the ribbon peeking out from the center.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, with the red ribbon bookmark visible and the book's thickness apparent.
